description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS/iOS/tvOS build that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a macOS job with two stages: pre-checks and build. In pre-checks, validate the format using a bash script. In build, use a matrix strategy to build for MacOS, iOS, and tvOS platforms in Debug and Release configurations, excluding tvOS-Debug. For each build, clone the repository, set up the build environment, configure CMake, build the project, and upload artifacts for Release builds.
